name: @louie-jones-strong/portfolio-builder
description: Fast CLI tool for building static portfolio websites from EJS templates. Powered by Bun.

scripts.test:ci: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let found=false;const walk=(d)=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){if(e.name==='node_modules'||e.name==='.git')continue;const p=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory()){walk(p);if(found)return;}else if(/(\.test\.|\.spec\.|_test_|_spec_)/.test(e.name)){found=true;return;}}};walk('.');if(found){require('child_process').execSync('bun test',{stdio:'inherit'});}else{console.log('No test files found; skipping tests.');}"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun run test:ci
